subject: Removing bad tilts
body:
Hi all,

I have a dataset that I aligned in etomo and to get a better model/remove
junks I removed some tiles in the fine alignment step (using 1,28-36 so
there are a bunch of bad tilts).

When I use ts_import_alignment I see all the views are imported into the
xml files and the use tilt section is True for all of them.

Is there an easy way to fix this?

Do you recommend I write a code to look at taSolution.log and edit the xml
files to change those views to False in use Tilt section?

Best,
Hamid
